<?php /* * This file is part of the Symfony package. * * (c) Fabien Potencier <fabien@symfony.com> * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace Symfony\Component\HttpClient\Chunk; /** * @author Nicolas Grekas <p@tchwork.com> * * @internal */ class InformationalChunk extends DataChunk { private array $status; public function __construct(int $statusCode, array $headers) { $this->status = [$statusCode, $headers]; parent::__construct(); } public function getInformationalStatus(): ?array { return $this->status; } }
